title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Chopper, Unknown person #14 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't say another word!! You'll wake her up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We need to run away right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If she wakes up, she'll kill us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, it won't matter... because even if we do run away...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "If she's here because she's following us, then...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Huuuuuuuuki? This woman is big mooooom!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: be quiet!! I'll kill her here and now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll just pretend that she's kaidou!! She's the same as him any- way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chopperemon, you need to fully explain this to us... otherwise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's Too Late!! Run for now!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 24 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
